docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAW ENTERTAINMENT LTD DBA. CONDOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ENRIQUE JOSEPH $1,336.98 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,381.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,336.00 FILED BY SAW ENTERTAINMENT LTD DBA. CONDOR AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ENRIQUE JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAW ENTERTAINMENT LTD DBA. CONDOR
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BRAD KAPLAN. FILED BY SAW ENTERTAINMENT LTD DBA. CONDOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-13-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK CALCAGNI-GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK CALCAGNI--GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2014 - JUDGMENT.
